PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: added per-(session,event) dispatch heartbeats and a heartbeats command

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: moved ccx format onto a canonical Rust format-core running via wazero

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added a notes.Client domain core and a verbose-comment → cc-notes redirect hook

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: reworked host credential sync around an origin-owned, stripped-envelope model

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-present.summary: shipped context-rich option primitives with facts and expandable detail

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: bundled recipes into a codex-ask executable; added the luna bounded-recon lane

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: ported the transcript query, analytics, cost, and ledger surfaces to a Rust core

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: added Phase-5 holder-v2 replay validation scenarios with fail-closed teardown

PushEvent:yasyf/getaway.summary: added a SerpApi Google Flights fallback and held-credit-card prefs + registry

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: bumped casks for cc-present v0.9.4, cc-pool v0.54.0, and cc-notes v0.31.0

PushEvent:yasyf/reposync.summary: added cross-host .env file sync — key-level LWW merge with a per-repo opt-out

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: locked down the host pf firewall with a to-self block and a WireGuard carve-out

captain-hook@v9.13.0.summary: deleted the once-guard shim now that the cache-decay gate has cleared

cc-context@v0.15.0.summary: gitignore-honoring find glob walk, ccx repipe guard, and a never-re-truncate rule

cc-guides@v0.1.21.summary: kind dirs at pack root only, case-folded README reservation, and import-name validation

cc-pool@v0.54.0.summary: removed back-compat, migration, and legacy-version cruft

slop-cop@v0.1.41.summary: packs.toml — added the missing steering pack to match the go flavor

spawnllm@v0.6.1.summary: added an OpenAI-compatible endpoint backend with an injectable transport
